name: Git Hooks Manager
description: Installs and configures pre-commit hooks for linting, formatting, and conventional commits in devcontainer projects

hooks.description: Comma-separated list of hooks to install (pre-commit, commitlint, prettier, lint-staged)

autoInstall.description: Automatically install hooks into the workspace git repository on container startup

configPath.description: Path to the pre-commit configuration file relative to workspace root
